rows.label: qev091002_MSG0001
rows.name: Well, that takes care of that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0002_m
rows.name:
Today was easy street. Didn't know
I was in the company of a master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0002_f
rows.name:
Today was easy street. Didn't know
I was in the company of a master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev091002_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask how useful you were.

rows.label: qev091002_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev091002_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Frye if he usually takes
on such missions alone.

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0003
rows.name: How useful? Hmm, lemme see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'd say four fingers of
Scotch, give or take.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0005
rows.name: Hey, why the scowl? That's a lot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0006
rows.name:
You have any idea how hard it is
to make good booze here on Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's the most precious thing we got!
...Well, after the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0007_02_m
rows.name: You should be proud.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0007_02_f
rows.name: You should be proud.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'd work with you again
any day, no question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0009
rows.name:
Nah, I try to work with
others when I can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0010
rows.name:
Of course, not many people are eager to
join me on the sorts of missions I take.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0011
rows.name:
So sometimes I'll just
handle 'em myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0012
rows.name:
But you? I'd work with you
again any day, no question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_SEL0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev091002_JNK0031
rows.name: Concur that you make a good team.

rows.label: qev091002_SEL0040
rows.name: Invite

rows.label: qev091002_JNK0041
rows.name:
Say Frye should forget work
and join you for a drink.

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0013
rows.name: That's what I'm saying![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0014
rows.name:
And I'm happy to help out
with your missions, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0015
rows.name:
Any time you see me hanging
around the diner, hit me up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0016
rows.name: Ha! You're insatiable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0017
rows.name:
I mean, yeah, obviously I'm
in, but I'd also be happy to
help out with missions, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091002_MSG0018
rows.name:
I mostly hang out around the
diner, so hit me up whenever.[ST:wait ]
